---
name: Bug Report
about: Report Bugs/Crashes that gets in the way using Sparrow
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## **By submitting this issue,**
- [ ] I Have checked that there are no other issues related to this
- [ ] I Have NOT used AI in creating this issue
- [ ] I Can confirm this is related to the image(s)
- [ ] I Can reproduce on a fresh installation
- [ ] I Am in compliance of the contributing guidelines.

### **Bug Type**
- [ ] Image Specific
- [ ] Build Process (Either manually or via github workflows)
- [ ] Other (Uncategorized Bugs)

### **Image Information ( If Image Specific )**
**Label:** ``label`` *(see the ``README.md`` for supported image tags)*
**Snapshot:** ``snapshot`` *(this is your current snapshot of the label)*
**Fedora:** ``44`` *(certain snapshots are tied to a specific version of fedora based on ublue images)*
- [ ] **``rpm-ostree``'s ``layers`` used** *(check if you have layers added)*
- [ ] **Custom configuration** *(check if you are not using Noctalia and/or Hyprland)*


### **The Problem**
Describe the bug you are experiencing with the Sparrow distribution. 
Attach a log file in relation of this bug if possible.

### **Reproduction**
List out the steps to produce the behavior in question, be precise on how you reproduced the bug.

### **Expected behavior**
Explain what Sparrow should be doing by design.
